description_long: This bungalow complex features a central courtyard surrounded by single-story residential units, with a large black-roofed structure dominating one side. The property is enclosed by green hedges and includes multiple outbuildings, such as garages and utility sheds, as well as a glass-roofed sunroom or patio area. The grounds are landscaped with paved walkways, driveways, and several parked vehicles, suggesting ample parking and outdoor living space. The main living quarters are arranged in a U-shape, providing private outdoor areas and easy access to communal spaces. The exterior materials appear to be a mix of brick, concrete, glass, and metal, with a combination of flat and pitched roofing. The overall layout is open and functional, designed for comfortable suburban or semi-urban living.
description: A spacious, single-story bungalow complex with a central courtyard, multiple outbuildings, and landscaped grounds, featuring a mix of brick, glass, and metal materials.
description_view_0: Side view showing the large black-roofed structure, central courtyard, and adjacent outbuildings.
description_view_1: Front-facing view highlighting the main entrance, driveway, and glass-roofed sunroom.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible garages, parking area, and the U-shaped arrangement of the main living quarters.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the black-roofed structure and the enclosed courtyard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
